zh.lifeSummary: 當John Warren於1555年8月1日之前出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德時，他的父親John Warren29歲，母親Agnes- Ann Howlett26歲。他於1577年10月4日與Elizabeth Scarlett在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德結婚。他們至少是14個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1613年11月4日在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國素福爾可納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Warren于1555年8月1日之前出生在英国英格兰素福爾可納易藍德时，他的父亲John Warren29岁，母亲Agnes- Ann Howlett26岁。他于1577年10月4日与Elizabeth Scarlett在英国英格兰素福爾可納易藍德结婚。他们至少是14个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1613年11月4日在他的家乡，埋葬在英国素福爾可納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Warren
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Warin, Werin, a borrowing of ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. Compare Waring .

English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from La Varrenne in Seine-Maritime, France, named with a Gaulish element probably descriptive of alluvial land or sandy soil. This was the name of a major Norman family after the Conquest. In Ireland, this name has been Gaelicized as Bharain.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane , Warner ).

variants.name: Warrens
meanings: English: variant of Warren with genitival or excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Warrener
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French warrennier ‘warrener’, an officer employed to watch over game in a park or game preserve. Compare Warren .

variants.name: Murnane
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin, a shortened and dissimilated form of Ó Manannáin ‘descendant of Manannán’, name borne in Celtic mythology by a sea god associated with the Isle of Man. All three syllables appear in the variant Marrinan. This name has also been Anglicized as Warren and Warner .

variants.name: Warne
meanings: occasionally a habitational name from Wearne in Somerset. The place takes its name from a lost stream-name based on British verno- ‘alder, swamp’.

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Warren was born before 1 August 1555, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Warren, was 29 and his mother, Agnes- Ann Howlett, was 26. He married Elizabeth Scarlett on 4 October 1577, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 14 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 4 November 1613, in his hometown, and was buried in Nayland, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Warren est né avant 1 août 1555, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Warren, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes- Ann Howlett, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Scarlett le 4 octobre 1577, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 14 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 4 novembre 1613, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Warren vor 1. August 1555 in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Warren 29 und seine Mutter Agnes- Ann Howlett 26. Er hat am 4. Oktober 1577 in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Scarlett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 14 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 4. November 1613 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nayland, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Warren è nato il prima del 1 agosto 1555 nel Nayland, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Warren, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes- Ann Howlett, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Scarlett il 4 ottobre 1577, nel Nayland, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 14 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 4 novembre 1613, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Nayland, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Warrenが1555年8月1日以前にイギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドで生まれた時，父John Warrenは29歳，母Agnes- Ann Howlettは26歳であった。1577年10月4日にイギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドでElizabeth Scarlettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも14人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1613年11月4日に故郷で死去し，イギリススフォルクナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Warren(이)가 1555년 8월 1일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Warren(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes- Ann Howlett(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1577년 10월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에서 Elizabeth Scarlett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1613년 11월 4일 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.before 1 August 1555–4 November 1613: antes 1 de agosto de 1555–4 de novembro de 1613
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Warren nasceu antes 1 de agosto de 1555, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Warren, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes- Ann Howlett, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Scarlett em 4 de outubro de 1577, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 14 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de novembro de 1613, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Warren родился перед 1 августа 1555 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Warren было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes- Ann Howlett, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Scarlett 4 октября 1577 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 14 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 4 ноября 1613 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия.

es.before 1 August 1555–4 November 1613: antes de 1 de agosto de 1555–4 de noviembre de 1613
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Warren nació antes de 1 de agosto de 1555, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Warren, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes- Ann Howlett, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Scarlett el 4 de octubre de 1577, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 14 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 4 de noviembre de 1613, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
